planner_recommendations.not_claimed: This recommendation exposes finite phase tags and a joint repeat horizon for the declared period bank. It is not a learned-embedding, extrapolation, training-stability, context-length, or model-quality proof.
This recommendation audits one finite query/key relative phase fixture under a common shift. It is not an attention quality, retrieval, equivariant-model, or model-quality theorem.

unsupported_fields: feature usefulness in a trained model
circle_ai_certifier_boundary.boundary: The passed receipt is a theorem-linked structural phase-feature certificate for one deterministic phase-bank and relative-phase fixture. It is not MultiCoil, RoPE, attention, retrieval, model-quality, context-length, runtime, memory-scaling, hardware-efficiency, deployment, transfer, benchmark, or ASI evidence.

commands.summary: deterministic MultiCoil phase-feature contract JSON emitted
Circle AI MultiCoil phase receipt emitted with request_passed=true
ready=True fields=7 missing=0 theorems=5 with two phase recommendations

commands.command: PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/circle_ai_contract_ready.py --kind multicoil_phase_feature --receipt --field joint_repeat_horizon --field relative_phase --require-theorem AIA-T0001 --require-theorem AIA-T0002 --require-theorem AIA-T0004 --require-theorem AIT-T0004 --require-theorem AIT-T0005 --require-recommendation PHASE-USE-JOINT-REPEAT-HORIZON --require-recommendation PHASE-AUDIT-RELATIVE-SHIFT-INVARIANT --require-recommendation-evidence-field PHASE-USE-JOINT-REPEAT-HORIZON=joint_repeat_horizon --require-recommendation-evidence-field PHASE-AUDIT-RELATIVE-SHIFT-INVARIANT=relative_phase
commands.summary: strict MultiCoil phase acceptance receipt accepted with two evidence fields, five theorem IDs, and two recommendations

non_claims: does not promote any chapter core claim
does not create a support-state transition
does not prove MultiCoil, RoPE, attention, retrieval, or model quality
does not prove context length, runtime speed, memory scaling, hardware efficiency, training stability, deployment readiness, transfer, benchmark performance, or ASI
does not prove that a MultiCoil phase feature should replace ordinary position buckets, learned position embeddings, RoPE, dense attention, recurrent, or state-space baselines
does not prove deployed proof-contract transport inside The ASI Stack
does not reproduce Theseus, MoECOT, VCM, PlanForge, model training, serving benchmarks, hardware-kernel benchmarks, or simulation results
does not make the external Circle checkout a vendored public dependency
